description: Push notifications Session A: install @capacitor/local-notifications@8.2.0, vendor to js/vendor/local-notifications.js, create js/notifications.js module (requestAndSchedule, scheduleDailyReminder, cancelAll, initDeepLink). Hook into daily reading completion in reading.js (fires once per install, 3s after result). i18n keys added to common.js (EN+TH). Plugin config added to capacitor.config.json.
notes: Session B remaining: initDeepLink() call, locale-switch reschedule, skip-if-already-read-today, in-app pre-prompt explainer (notifPermissionNudge). smallIcon value is Android placeholder — replace with real drawable before Android build. No Xcode capability needed for local-only notifications.
